tasks.subject: Task 1: Migration + avatar SQL queries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** account_avatar table + small avatar_content_type/avatar_etag columns on account + sqlc queries.

**Files:** Create db/migrations/002_avatar.sql; Modify db/queries/account.sql; regenerate pkg/db.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/002_avatar.sql","db/queries/account.sql","pkg/db"],"verifyCommand":"podman compose up -d && mise db:up && mise exec -- sqlc generate && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["002 applies; account has avatar_content_type+avatar_etag; account_avatar exists","sqlc generate + go build pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: pkg/avatar pipeline + URL helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure package: Process (decode→square-crop→512² resize→WebP q85/m6 encode, 5MB+garbage guards) + PublicURL/AccountURL. Add gen2brain/webp + x/image.

**Files:** Create pkg/avatar/avatar.go + avatar_test.go; Modify go.mod/go.sum.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/avatar/avatar.go","pkg/avatar/avatar_test.go","go.mod","go.sum"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/avatar/ -v && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags nodynamic ./pkg/avatar/","acceptanceCriteria":[">5MB→ErrTooLarge; garbage→ErrInvalidImage; valid→512x512 webp+etag","PublicURL/AccountURL correct","builds no-cgo with nodynamic"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Avatar HTTP endpoints + SessionView.avatarUrl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PUT/DELETE /me/avatar (authed, tx bytes+meta), public GET /avatar/{subject} (ETag/304/404), SessionView.avatarUrl.

**Files:** Create pkg/server/handle_avatar.go + test; Modify pkg/contract/auth.go, pkg/server/handle_me.go, server.go.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_avatar.go","pkg/server/handle_avatar_test.go","pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/handle_me.go","pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run Avatar -v","acceptanceCriteria":["PUT stores+refreshes; DELETE clears; both need session","public GET image/webp+ETag; 304; 404 none/unknown/disabled","/me avatarUrl"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: FE upload helper, store field, image UserAvatar
tasks.description:
**Goal:** api.upload (raw PUT)+api.del; SessionView.avatarUrl + reload(); UserAvatar src (img→initials→icon, @error fallback).

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/lib/api.ts, stores/auth.ts, UserAvatar.vue + test.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/lib/api.ts","dashboard/src/stores/auth.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/UserAvatar.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/UserAvatar.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/UserAvatar.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["api.upload raw PUT throws ApiError on non-2xx","UserAvatar img for src; fallback on error/empty"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Edit Profile dialog + NavUser wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EditDisplayNameDialog→EditProfileDialog (avatar upload/remove + name); 'Edit profile' item; NavUser avatarUrl; i18n + error codes.

**Files:** git mv dialog (+test); Modify NavUser.vue, stores/auth.ts (reload), locales/en.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/EditProfileDialog.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/EditProfileDialog.test.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.vue","dashboard/src/stores/auth.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/EditProfileDialog.test.ts src/components/custom/NavUser.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["Edit profile dialog avatar upload/remove + name","upload→api.upload→reload; remove→api.del; >5MB reject; errors mapped","NavUser avatarUrl"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Admin views — AccountView.avatarUrl + render
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AccountView.avatarUrl (both projections); render UserAvatar :src in admin list+detail.

**Files:** Modify pkg/contract/auth.go, pkg/server/handle_account.go, admin AdminAccountsView.vue + AdminAccountDetailView.vue.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/handle_account.go","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminAccountsView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminAccountDetailView.vue"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run Account -v && cd dashboard && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["AccountView.avatarUrl in both projections","admin list+detail render avatars"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: OIDC picture claim
tasks.description:
**Goal:** profileClaims(a,origin) emits picture; thread origin via idTokenInput.Issuer + userinfoClaims(a,scope,origin).

**Files:** Modify pkg/protocol/oidc/claims.go + userinfo.go + claims_test.go.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/claims.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/userinfo.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/claims_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["picture present with profile scope+avatar; absent otherwise"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: SAML avatar_url attribute source
tasks.description:
**Goal:** resolveSource avatar_url source (thread origin); document in SAML attr-map hint.

**Files:** Modify pkg/protocol/saml/attributes.go + caller + test; locales/en.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/attributes.go","pkg/protocol/saml/attributes_test.go","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["avatar_url returns URL when set, nil when unset","hint documents avatar_url"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Smoke coverage + done-gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Smoke avatar round-trip (PUT→public GET→userinfo picture); full gate; rebuild+commit dist.

**Files:** Modify cmd/smoke/main.go; pkg/webui/dist.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/smoke/main.go","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build && cd .. && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["smoke avatar PUT→GET 200→userinfo picture; SMOKE_EXIT=0","gate green; dist rebuilt+committed"]}
```
